entity.summary: Decentralized Layer-1 trading platform supporting fully on-chain spot order books, perpetuals, futures, lending, staking, and liquidity pools.
entity.notes: HEI models Demex and the Demex AMM discovery row as one exchange entity. Official documentation describes Demex as a decentralized L1 platform with on-chain spot, perpetual, and futures order-book trading backed by liquidity vaults and AMMs.

evidence.title: About Demex
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Demex as the Decentralized Mercantile Exchange, a decentralized L1 platform supporting on-chain spot, perpetual, and futures trading.

evidence.title: Demex official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform domain remains available and links into the active trading application and documentation ecosystem.

evidence.title: Demex exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates Demex identity; HEI consolidates AMM and exchange source rows into one entity.
